title: Choose Consultation Type Screen with Fee & Discount Logic

requirements.summary: Create a 'Choose Consultation Type' screen that displays three selectable consultation type cards (Online, Clinic Visit, Home Visit) with single-selection behavior, styled in the Medical Blue theme
acceptanceCriteria: The screen is accessible via the route `/consultation-type/:doctorId`.
Three consultation type cards are displayed: Online, Clinic Visit, and Home Visit, each with its emoji icon and a short description.
Selecting a card visually highlights it (active state) and deselects the previously selected card.
Only one consultation type can be active at a time.
The screen follows the Medical Blue theme consistently.

file_operations.description: Create a new page component that renders the consultation type selection screen. Display three selectable consultation type cards (💻 Online with description 'Video call with doctor', 🏥 Clinic Visit with description 'Visit doctor at clinic', 🏠 Home Visit with description 'Doctor visits your home'). Use useState to manage the selected consultation type. Apply active/inactive styling using the Medical Blue theme colors (brand-primary, brand-secondary). Ensure only one card can be selected at a time. Extract doctorId from route params using useParams.

Register the new route `/consultation-type/:doctorId` in the TanStack Router configuration, mapping it to the ConsultationTypePage component. Place it in the public routes section alongside other consultation-related routes.

requirements.summary: Implement automatic fee calculation logic on the consultation type screen with travel fee (Home Visit only), corporate discount (10%), and subscription discount (15%), displaying a detailed fee breakdown summary
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting 'Home Visit' adds a ₹200 travel fee line item to the fee breakdown.
Selecting 'Online' or 'Clinic Visit' does not show a travel fee line item.
A corporate discount line item (10% off) is shown and applied when the mock corporate flag is true.
A subscription discount line item (15% off) is shown and applied when the mock subscription flag is true.
The fee breakdown section shows: Base Fee, Travel Fee (conditional), Corporate Discount (conditional), Subscription Discount (conditional), and Total Payable.
Total Payable updates in real time when the consultation type is changed.
Fee breakdown is clearly readable and styled with the Medical Blue theme.

file_operations.description: Add fee calculation logic using React state and useEffect. Define mock values: base consultation fee (extract from doctor data or use ₹500 as default), travel fee (₹200), corporate account flag (mock: true/false), subscription flag (mock: true/false). When 'Home Visit' is selected, add travel fee to base fee. Apply 10% corporate discount if corporate flag is true (on the running total). Apply 15% subscription discount if subscription flag is true (on the discounted price, sequentially). Display a fee breakdown section below the consultation type cards showing: Base Fee, Travel Fee (only for Home Visit), Corporate Discount (if applicable, show percentage and amount), Subscription Discount (if applicable, show percentage and amount), and Total Payable. Use the Medical Blue theme for the breakdown section styling. Recalculate and update the breakdown whenever the selected consultation type changes.

requirements.summary: Add a 'Continue' button at the bottom of the consultation type screen that is disabled until a type is selected and navigates to the slot selection page with consultation type and total fee parameters
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Continue' button is displayed at the bottom of the screen.
The button is visually disabled when no consultation type is selected.
The button becomes active once a consultation type is selected.
Clicking 'Continue' navigates the user to the slot selection step, passing the selected consultation type and total fee as parameters.
The button is styled in the Medical Blue theme.

file_operations.description: Add a prominent 'Continue' button at the bottom of the page styled with the Medical Blue theme (bg-brand-primary, hover:bg-brand-secondary, text-white). Disable the button (opacity-50, cursor-not-allowed) when no consultation type is selected. Enable the button when a consultation type is selected. On click, use React Router's navigate function to navigate to `/book-slot/:doctorId`, passing the selected consultation type and calculated total fee as query parameters (e.g., ?type=online&fee=425). Ensure the button is clearly visible and accessible.

requirements.summary: Update the 'Book Appointment' button on the Doctor Profile screen to navigate to the new 'Choose Consultation Type' screen instead of any previous destination
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Book Appointment' on any Doctor Profile screen navigates to `/consultation-type/:doctorId` with the correct doctorId.
The navigation does not produce any console errors or missing-route warnings.
The route `/consultation-type/:doctorId` is registered in the root router configuration (`frontend/src/App.tsx`).

file_operations.description: Locate the 'Book Appointment' button in the PublicDoctorProfilePage component. Update its onClick handler to navigate to `/consultation-type/:doctorId` using React Router's navigate function, passing the doctorId from the current route params. Remove any previous navigation destination. Ensure the button click triggers the navigation without console errors.
